args.content:
# Hawaii Trip Packing List

Based on the vacation itinerary from June 10-20, 2024:

## Essential Items
- Travel documents (ID, boarding passes, hotel reservations)
- Phone and charger
- Camera
- Cash and credit cards

## Clothing
- Swimwear (for beach days and snorkeling)
- Casual outfits for daily wear
- Hiking shoes/boots (specifically for Diamond Head hike on June 13)
- Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
- Sleepwear
- Undergarments and socks

## Beach and Outdoor Gear
- Sunscreen (reef-safe)
- Sunglasses
- Hat/cap
- Beach towel
- Reusable water bottle
- Snorkeling gear (if not renting)
- Hiking backpack (for Diamond Head hike)

## Toiletries
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Shampoo and conditioner
- Body wash
- Razor
- Deodorant
- Makeup and makeup remover
- Hairbrush/comb
- Medications

## Electronics
- Phone and charger
- Camera and charger
- Power bank
- Travel adapter (if needed)

## Activity-Specific Items
- Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike on June 13)
- Water shoes (for snorkeling at Hanauma Bay)
- Lightweight rain jacket (for potential showers)
- Binoculars (for sightseeing)

## Optional Items
- Books or e-reader
- Travel pillow
- Snacks
- Gift items for others
